examples: The microphone was cunningly concealed in the bookcase.
The Gherkin is cunningly crafted out of two types of melon and embedded with green beans to highlight its renowned spiraling glass frames.
They were cunningly disguised in golf clothes.
Even the United Kingdom Independence Party (UKIP), a small anti-EU group, has been cunningly sidetracked.
T.s might even send out cunningly benign signals as bait in which to lure us into communication.
